summary: Full e2e testing of Madio Doors & Windows catalogue app. Backend APIs all pass (13/13). Frontend UI fully functional - home page, catalogue, about, contact, print pages all working correctly.

issues: Address shows 'Shilpa Layout, Weaker Section Colony, Izzathnagar, Shilpa Hills' which seems more verbose than the specified '1, Plot, Road, Hitex Road, Kondapur'. Minor mismatch but functionally fine.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — should use lifespan context manager in FastAPI 0.95+
Contact address in Contact.js has extra lines (Shilpa Layout, Weaker Section Colony, Izzathnagar, Shilpa Hills) not matching the specified brief address
seed_data_creation: 18 products seeded in MongoDB on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified: home page hero/tagline/CTAs, catalogue with 18 products + category filters + search, product modal with specs, about page (mission/vision/values), contact form (submit working), print page (/print) with all 18 products. No NHPC branding found anywhere. Backend APIs: /api/products returns 18 items, category filters work, /api/contact saves and responds correctly.
